response.justification: The candidate presents a strong overall software development background with extensive experience in senior roles and a good grasp of modern development practices, including some exposure to Investment Banking. However, the resume critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of strong hands-on C++ development experience on Windows, showing only a very limited C++ background. This fundamental mismatch, combined with the absence of explicit SQL Server/Oracle experience, makes the candidate unsuitable for this specific role despite other strengths.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (10+ years) in senior/staff roles.
Relevant domain experience in Investment Banking/Capital Markets.
Strong understanding and application of modern software craftsmanship and CI/CD practices.
concerns: Critical lack of mandatory 5-10 years of strong C++ development experience.
Limited or no explicit experience with SQL Server or Oracle.
No direct Fixed Income or Fixed Income Derivatives domain expertise.
